message:
🐛 Fix API returning null instead of empty array (#2297)

* 🐛 Fix API returning null instead of empty array

nil Go slices serialize to JSON null, causing frontend crashes on
.map()/.filter()/.length when no clusters respond. Initialize all
multi-cluster aggregation slices with make([]T, 0) so they serialize
to [] instead.

Affects: pods, pod issues, deployment issues, deployments, services,
and security issues endpoints.

Fixes #2235

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Ensure all API slice responses serialize as [] not null

Complete the fix from a78387ab — convert ALL remaining `var slice []T`
declarations to `make([]T, 0)` across every handler file, and add
nil-to-empty guards on single-cluster code paths in mcp.go so that
k8sClient methods returning nil still produce `[]` in JSON.

Files fixed: mcp.go (15 multi-cluster + 19 single-cluster paths),
admission_webhooks.go, benchmarks.go, crds.go, gitops.go,
namespaces.go, rbac.go, rewards.go, service_exports.go, workloads.go.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix nil slices in MCP bridge parse functions and ListClusters handler

Address Copilot review comments: MCP bridge parse functions
(parsePodsResult, parsePodIssuesResult, parseEventsResult,
parseClustersResult) used var slice []T which stays nil when no text
content is found, causing JSON null in bridge-path responses. Initialize
with make([]T, 0) so they always return []. Also add nil guard on
ListClusters k8s-client path.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
